# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: write

env:
  BUILD_TYPE: Release
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 30

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: [linux-x64, linux-arm64, windows-x64, darwin-x64, darwin-arm64]
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
      
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false
      
      - name: Set up build environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm audit --audit-level=high
      
      - name: Run security scan
        run: |
          npm run security-check || true
      
      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build -- --platform=${{ matrix.platform }}
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
      
      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          npm run test:ci
      
      - name: Create build info
        run: |
          cat > build-info.json << EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "platform": "${{ matrix.platform }}",
            "build_date": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "build_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "commit_message": $(echo '${{ github.event.head_commit.message }}' | jq -Rs .),
            "actor": "${{ github.actor }}"
          }
          EOF
      
      - name: Prepare artifacts directory
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}
          mkdir -p artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/bin
          mkdir -p artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/config
          mkdir -p artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/scripts
      
      - name: Copy binaries
        run: |
          cp -r dist/bin/* artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/bin/ || true
          chmod +x artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/bin/* || true
      
      - name: Copy configuration files
        run: |
          cp config/*.json artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/config/ || true
          cp config/*.yaml artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/config/ || true
          cp config/*.yml artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/config/ || true
          find artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/config -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
      
      - name: Sanitize configuration files
        run: |
          for file in artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/config/*; do
            if [ -f "$file" ]; then
              sed -i 's/password[[:space:]]*[:=][[:space:]]*[^[:space:]]*/password: REDACTED/gi' "$file"
              sed -i 's/secret[[:space:]]*[:=][[:space:]]*[^[:space:]]*/secret: REDACTED/gi' "$file"
              sed -i 's/token[[:space:]]*[:=][[:space:]]*[^[:space:]]*/token: REDACTED/gi' "$file"
              sed -i 's/api[_-]key[[:space:]]*[:=][[:space:]]*[^[:space:]]*/api_key: REDACTED/gi' "$file"
            fi
          done
      
      - name: Copy deployment scripts
        run: |
          cp scripts/deploy*.sh artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/scripts/ || true
          cp scripts/install*.sh artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/scripts/ || true
          cp scripts/setup*.sh artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/scripts/ || true
          chmod +x artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/scripts/*.sh || true
      
      - name: Add build info to artifacts
        run: |
          cp build-info.json artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/
          cp README.md artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/ || true
          cp LICENSE artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/ || true
      
      - name: Generate checksums
        run: |
          cd artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}
          find . -type f ! -name 'checksums.txt' -exec sha256sum {} \; > checksums.txt
      
      - name: Create archive
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          tar -czf ${{ matrix.platform }}-build-${{ github.run_number }}.tar.gz ${{ matrix.platform }}/
          sha256sum ${{ matrix.platform }}-build-${{ github.run_number }}.tar.gz > ${{ matrix.platform }}-build-${{ github.run_number }}.tar.gz.sha256
      
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: |
            artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}-build-${{ github.run_number }}.tar.gz
            artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}-build-${{ github.run_number }}.tar.gz.sha256
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9
      
      - name: Upload individual artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: artifacts-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: artifacts/${{ matrix.platform }}/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

  create-manifest:
    name: Create Build Manifest
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
      
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      
      - name: Create manifest
        run: |
          cat > build-manifest.json << EOF
          {
            "build_id": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "workflow_run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "repository": "${{ github.repository }}",
            "triggered_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "platforms": [
              "linux-x64",
              "linux-arm64",
              "windows-x64",
              "darwin-x64",
              "darwin-arm64"
            ],
            "artifact_retention_days": ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }},
            "download_url": "https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          }
          EOF
      
      - name: Upload manifest
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-manifest-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: build-manifest.json
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}

  notify:
    name: Notify Team
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, create-manifest]
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
      
      - name: Create notification
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.build.result }}" == "success" ]; then
            STATUS="✅ SUCCESS"
            COLOR="good"
          else
            STATUS="❌ FAILED"
            COLOR="danger"
          fi
          
          cat > notification.json << EOF
          {
            "status": "$STATUS",
            "build_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "commit": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "download_url": "https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          }
          EOF
          
          cat notification.json
      
      - name: Summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Artifacts Available" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Build Number:** ${{ github.run_number }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Branch:** ${{ github.ref_name }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Commit:** ${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Triggered by:** ${{ github.actor }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Available Platforms" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- linux-x64" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- linux-arm64" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- windows-x64" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- darwin-x64" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- darwin-arm64" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Retention:** ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }} days" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "[Download Artifacts](https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }})" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
